title: Basically Vibin' (Temporarily Discontinued)
description: A w.i.p. resource pack, specially designed in my style with warm, vibrant colors and a simple, cozy vibe.
body:
![A display of the pack's major features.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15247e5140f2a5e18d1c82f1e3ee0f70dac505c3_0.webp)

This is my wip resource pack, specially designed in my style with warm, vibrant colors and a simple cozy vibe. Hope you enjoy!

## Check out the [Official Bedrock Port](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/basically-vibin-bedrock) made by [Zomphey](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/zomphey/)!

_Please expect updates to be irregular. Sometimes I just don't have that creative itch. :P_

Progress:
-

- Block Textures: 10%

- Item Textures: < 1%

- Mob Textures: 0%

Please share any and all constructive feedback [Here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/basically-vibin/)! :)
